_meta.dashboard_focus: Roadmap execution by week, month, year

summary.review_cadence: Weekly roadmap review + monthly rebaseline + annual horizon view

launch_gates.name: OEM validation
launch_gates.turns_green_when: At least one OEM has a complete audited cert pack and usable commercial path.
launch_gates.current_note: OEM audit not complete; cert packs not yet collected.

launch_gates.name: Regulatory clarity
launch_gates.turns_green_when: All 4 critical regulatory questions have proof-backed answers and execution notes.

launch_gates.name: Working capital readiness
launch_gates.turns_green_when: Funding status is explicitly classified and first production is financially executable.
launch_gates.current_note: $150k-$250k not yet confirmed; capital memo still needed.

launch_gates.name: Packaging lock
launch_gates.turns_green_when: Fixed-field baseline locked; conditional fields tied to proof; blocked items isolated.
launch_gates.current_note: Some structure can lock now, but VN + Arabic/regulatory-dependent fields remain unresolved.

top_blockers.title: OEM cert packs not yet collected
top_blockers.impact: Blocks OEM validation, production confidence, compliance confidence

top_blockers.title: Indonesia halal recognition unresolved (CICOT/BPJPH)
top_blockers.impact: Blocks halal strategy confidence and Indonesia planning

top_blockers.title: Vietnam sticker vs printed label unresolved
top_blockers.impact: Blocks VN packaging lock and launch-timing realism

top_blockers.title: Saudi SABER / Ghad sequence unresolved
top_blockers.impact: Blocks Saudi compliance sequencing and lead-time model

top_blockers.title: Working capital source not yet confirmed
top_blockers.impact: Blocks production deposits, launch timing, and commitment language

priority_themes: Resolve regulatory unknowns with source-backed answers
Build weekly operating cadence and gate review discipline
Lock packaging baseline without embedding unresolved assumptions
Pressure-test capital plan against first production window

weekly.label: W14 · Apr 3-5
weekly.goal: Stabilize operating control and surface hard blockers as explicit dashboard objects.
focus: Canonical roadmap live and aligned to launch gates
Blockers register and red-to-green plan in force
Dashboard model updated to track week/month/year views

weekly.label: W15 · Apr 6-12
focus: Collect full cert packs from Bright Can + Petmeal
Run desk audit and issue Go/Warn/No-Go recommendation
Open named source path for all 4 regulatory questions

weekly.label: W16 · Apr 13-19
focus: Classify funding as Funded / Partially funded / Unfunded
Publish BRD-002 fixed / conditional / blocked matrix
exit_criteria: Two highest-value regulatory questions materially advanced

weekly.label: W17 · Apr 20-26
weekly.goal: Rebaseline launch assumptions based on proof.
focus: Decide whether Sep launch language remains defensible
Escalate any gate still lacking owner/date/proof path
exit_criteria: Market order tied to actual gate status

monthly.label: Apr 2026
monthly.objective: Build operating baseline, OEM visibility, and decision discipline.
must_win: OEM cert pack collection + audit underway
Regulatory source paths active for all 4 OQs

monthly.label: May 2026
monthly.objective: Resolve core regulatory ambiguity and lock packaging inputs.
must_win: OQ-REG-01/02/03/04 materially resolved or escalated through experts
BRD-002 fixed / conditional / blocked matrix locked
Channel launch order tightened against actual regulatory reality

monthly.label: Jun 2026
monthly.objective: Move from question-resolution into compliance-prep execution.
must_win: Saudi compliance path clarified enough for realistic sequencing
Funding posture supports first production planning

monthly.label: Jul-Aug 2026
monthly.objective: Create launch assets only after compliance path is real.
must_win: Packaging variants produced for required markets
Vietnam DAHP and labeling path clear enough for execution
Marketplace infrastructure build begins where gates allow

monthly.label: Sep 2026 (tentative)
monthly.objective: First marketplace launch window if gates clear.
must_win: Shopee VN/MY and Amazon US/UAE launch only where compliance base exists

yearly.objective: De-risk Veela from operating setup into first real market entry.
chapters: Q3: Packaging, compliance prep, launch-asset build
Q3/Q4: First marketplaces live where evidence allows
Q4: Distributor prep follows proof, not hope
yearly.success_definition: At least one evidence-backed first-market launch path is operational without unresolved hard-gate assumptions.

yearly.label: 2027 horizon
yearly.objective: Convert first-market proof into scaled channel expansion.
chapters: GCC distributor activation after Saudi/UAE compliance clearance
Profitability discipline and facility go/no-go logic
yearly.success_definition: Scale only after regulatory proof, packaging readiness, and channel economics are validated.

market_sequence.why_now: Relatively cleaner path and ASEAN proof-point candidate
market_sequence.main_gate: Market registration path still needs formalization

market_sequence.why_now: Commercially attractive but authority path still ambiguous
High-value GCC path and halal moat potential
Large upside if FSVP/FDA/AAFCO chain becomes workable
Important halal/ASEAN logic but currently too ambiguous

activity.msg: Dashboard data model upgraded to roadmap views: weekly, monthly, yearly.
Launch gates and blocker priorities aligned to canonical roadmap.
Canonical roadmap, launch gates, blockers register, and red-to-green plan published.
